meta.title: CI/CD Deployment Pipelines for Next.js
meta.excerpt: Setting up robust continuous integration and deployment workflows with GitHub Actions and Vercel

props.body: Automated deployment pipelines eliminate human error, accelerate delivery, and provide confidence in every release. A well-designed CI/CD pipeline is the foundation of sustainable software delivery.

props.text: Our pipeline runs automatically on every push, enforcing quality gates before any code reaches production. Each stage must pass before the next begins.
Our workflow is defined in YAML and runs on GitHub-hosted runners. Jobs are parallelized where possible to minimize total pipeline duration.

props.code:
name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  quality:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v2
        with:
          version: 8
          
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: "pnpm"
      
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      
      - name: Lint
        run: pnpm lint
      
      - name: Type Check
        run: pnpm type-check
      
      - name: Unit Tests
        run: pnpm test:unit --coverage
      
      - name: Upload Coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v3
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

  build:
    needs: quality
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v2
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: "pnpm"
      
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm build
      
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: build
          path: .next

  e2e:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: build
          path: .next
      
      - name: Install Playwright
        run: pnpm exec playwright install --with-deps
      
      - name: Run E2E Tests
        run: pnpm test:e2e
      
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        if: failure()
        with:
          name: playwright-report
          path: playwright-report

  deploy:
    needs: e2e
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - uses: amondnet/vercel-action@v25
        with:
          vercel-token: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }}
          vercel-org-id: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_ORG_ID }}
          vercel-project-id: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_PROJECT_ID }}
          vercel-args: "--prod"

props.title: Caching for Speed
props.body: The pnpm cache and build artifact sharing between jobs significantly reduces pipeline duration. Without caching, dependency installation alone can take 2-3 minutes per job.

props.text: Our branching model balances simplicity with the need for staging environments and emergency fixes.

props.title: Branch Protection Rules
rows: Required reviews, status checks, no force push
Required status checks, no force push

props.text: Environment variables are managed securely through Vercel with different values for each deployment environment.

features.title: Development
features.description: Local databases, verbose logging, hot reload enabled

features.title: Preview
features.description: Staging databases, moderate logging, PR-specific URLs

features.title: Production
features.description: Production databases, error-only logging, CDN caching

features.title: Database Isolation
features.description: Each environment has separate database instance

props.text: When issues occur in production, fast rollback is critical. Our strategy provides multiple rollback options depending on the severity and type of issue.

props.title: Rollback Options
rows: Code changes that need to be undone permanently

props.title: Database Migrations
props.body: Always write migrations with rollback scripts. Forward-only migrations that cannot be reversed make rollbacks impossible when they involve schema changes.

props.text: Deployment is not complete until we have confirmed the release is healthy. Automated monitoring catches issues that tests miss.

features.title: Health Endpoints
features.description: API health checks verify all services are responding

features.title: Error Rate Monitoring
features.description: Spike detection in Sentry error rates post-deploy

features.title: Performance Metrics
features.description: Core Web Vitals and API response time tracking

features.title: Real User Monitoring
features.description: Synthetic and real user experience tracking

props.body: Invest in CI/CD early - the time saved compounds with every deployment. Automated pipelines eliminate human error, provide confidence in releases, and enable the rapid iteration that modern software development requires.
